articles.title: “They Were Born Disease-Free”: UK Scientists Use Three-Parent IVF to Deliver 8 Healthy Babies and Eliminate Deadly Genetic Disorders - Rude Baguette
articles.summary: “They Were Born Disease-Free”: UK Scientists Use Three-Parent IVF to Deliver 8 Healthy Babies and Eliminate Deadly Genetic Disorders In a groundbreaking medical achievement, doctors in the United Kingdom have successfully utilized an innovative IVF technique to deliver eight healthy babies free from severe mitochondrial diseases, marking a significant milestone in reproductive medicine and offering new hope to families worldwide.

articles.summary: Aging Clock Unveils Compounds That Rejuvenate Brain Cells FeaturedNeuroscience·July 22, 2025 Summary: Scientists developed a computational “aging clock” that measures the biological age of brain cells and identifies compounds with rejuvenating potential. By analyzing gene activity from healthy and neurodegenerative brain tissue, they pinpointed 453 interventions predicted to reverse cellular aging.
